evals.prompt: Generate a 256×256 app icon for a todo list app. Soft pastel palette, friendly look.
evals.expected_outcome: Claude calls spec-builder.mjs to write a 5-section spec under handoffs/, then invokes codex-invoke.mjs --imagegen with --sandbox workspace-write, producing a PNG under docs/carefully-crafted-plugins/output/images/.

assertions.name: imagegen_flag_passed
assertions.description: codex-invoke.mjs is invoked with the --imagegen flag (activates gpt-image-2 $imagegen)

assertions.name: sandbox_workspace_write
assertions.description: codex-invoke.mjs receives --sandbox workspace-write so Codex can write the PNG

evals.prompt: Iterate on the previous icon — make the color more saturated and bump contrast
evals.expected_outcome: Claude invokes codex-invoke.mjs --imagegen --raw with --ref pointing at the previous PNG, refining rather than starting fresh.

assertions.name: raw_iteration_mode
assertions.description: iteration uses --raw (no new spec) rather than spec-builder

evals.expected_outcome: Claude pre-flights for missing context (subject, dimensions, mood) before invoking — never charges ahead with an underspecified brief.

assertions.name: preflight_clarification
assertions.description: Claude asks at least one clarifying question (e.g. 'what subject?', 'what dimensions?') before invoking codex-invoke.mjs
